seoTitle: Felton vs Felton South — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Felton and Felton South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Felton vs Felton South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Felton and Felton South.
heading: Felton vs Felton South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Felton, Queensland and Felton South, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Felton has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Felton South (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Felton or Felton South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Felton has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Felton South scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Felton scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Felton South scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Felton or Felton South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Felton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
